pub struct TiersResponse {
    pub hot: u64,
    pub warm: u64,
    pub cold: u64,
    pub forgotten: u64,
    pub total: u64,
    pub forgetting_enabled: bool,
}
pub struct TierTransitionDto {
    pub entry_id: String,
    pub scope_id: String,
    pub from_tier: String,
    pub to_tier: String,
    pub retention_score: f64,
    pub reason: String,
    pub timestamp: String,
}
